hooks.command: if [ -f .claude/coordination/TASKS.md ]; then echo '== ACTIVE COLLABORATION =='; cat .claude/coordination/TASKS.md; echo; tail -20 .claude/coordination/LOG.md 2>/dev/null; fi; if [ -d .claude/teams ]; then echo '== ACTIVE TEAMS =='; ls .claude/teams 2>/dev/null; fi; bash ~/.claude/lib/git-identity.sh 2>&1 || true

input=$(cat); cmd=$(printf '%s' "$input" | python3 -c 'import json,sys;d=json.load(sys.stdin);print(d.get("tool_input",{}).get("command",""))' 2>/dev/null || true); case "$cmd" in *'git commit'*|*'git push'*|*'gh pr create'*|*'gh pr edit'*) bash ~/.claude/lib/git-identity.sh 2>&1 || true ;; esac; exit 0
